mapper.select:
SELECT G.GROUPBUY_ID , G.STORE_ID , S.STORE_NM , G.LOCATION_ID , L.LOCATION_NM , G.PRODUCT_ID , P.PRODUCT_NM , P.ORG_PRICE AS ORG_SALES_PRICE /* 소비자가(ORG_PRICE) 기준 */ , G.GROUPBUY_NM , G.GROUPBUY_TYPE , G.TARGET_QTY , G.TARGET_AMOUNT , G.CURRENT_QTY , G.CURRENT_AMOUNT , G.START_DATE , G.END_DATE , G.PICKUP_START_DATE , G.PICKUP_END_DATE , G.PICKUP_MODE , G.STATUS , G.PAY_TYPE FROM groupbuy_mst G LEFT JOIN store_mst S ON G.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID LEFT JOIN store_location_mst L ON G.LOCATION_ID = L.LOCATION_ID LEFT JOIN product_mst P ON G.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID
WHERE G.STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND G.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId}
AND G.START_DATE >= #{startDate} AND G.START_DATE < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND G.STATUS != 'CANCEL' ORDER BY G.START_DATE DESC
mapper.update: /** batch : 공동구매 픽업 시간 지난 후 노쇼 처리 */ UPDATE groupbuy_join_mst SET join_status = 'NOSHOW', update_date = NOW() WHERE groupbuy_id = #{groupbuyId} AND join_status = 'JOIN' AND SALES_ID IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT JM.GROUPBUY_JOIN_MST_ID , JM.USER_ID , JM.JOIN_STATUS , JM.TOTAL_QTY , JM.UNIT_PRICE , JM.SALES_ID , JM.CREATE_DATE , G.GROUPBUY_ID , G.GROUPBUY_NM , G.STATUS AS GROUPBUY_STATUS , G.PRODUCT_ID , P.PRODUCT_NM , P.ORG_PRICE AS ORG_SALES_PRICE , G.TARGET_QTY , G.CURRENT_QTY , G.PICKUP_START_DATE , G.PICKUP_END_DATE , COALESCE(G.IMAGE_URL, (SELECT PI.IMAGE_URL FROM product_image_dtl PI WHERE PI.PRODUCT_ID = G.PRODUCT_ID AND PI.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY PI.SORT_ORDER ASC LIMIT 1)) AS IMAGE_URL , COALESCE( (SELECT PS.SALES_PRICE FROM groupbuy_price_step PS WHERE PS.GROUPBUY_ID = G.GROUPBUY_ID AND PS.STEP_QTY_FROM <= G.CURRENT_QTY ORDER BY PS.STEP_QTY_FROM DESC LIMIT 1), P.ORG_PRICE ) AS CUR_UNIT_PRICE FROM groupbuy_join_mst JM JOIN groupbuy_mst G ON JM.GROUPBUY_ID = G.GROUPBUY_ID LEFT JOIN product_mst P ON G.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID WHERE JM.USER_ID = #{userId} AND G.STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND JM.JOIN_STATUS IN ('JOIN','PAYED') ORDER BY JM.CREATE_DATE DESC
SELECT IFNULL(ORG_SALES_PRICE, 0) FROM product_mst WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId}
SELECT SALES_PRICE AS salesPrice , SALES_RATE AS salesRate FROM groupbuy_price_step WHERE GROUPBUY_ID = #{groupbuyId} AND STEP_QTY_FROM <= #{qty} ORDER BY STEP_QTY_FROM DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT L.PRODUCT_DTL_ID AS productDtlId , (L.ORG_STOCK_QTY - IFNULL(SUM(SD.QTY),0)) AS availableQty FROM product_dtl L LEFT JOIN sales_dtl SD ON L.PRODUCT_DTL_ID = SD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID WHERE L.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND L.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId} AND L.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND L.EXPIRATION_DATE >= CURDATE() GROUP BY L.PRODUCT_DTL_ID HAVING availableQty > 0 ORDER BY L.EXPIRATION_DATE ASC, L.RECEIVED_DATE ASC FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sales_mst (STORE_ID, USER_ID, TOTAL_QTY, TOTAL_PRICE, DISCOUNT_PRICE, FINAL_PRICE, PAYMENT_TYPE, SALES_DATE, SALES_STATUS, SALES_TYPE, DESCRIPTION, CREATE_DATE, CREATE_USER) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{userId}, #{totalQty}, #{totalPrice}, #{discountPrice}, #{finalPrice}, 'GRP', NOW(), 'COMPLETE', 'RESERVATION', #{description}, NOW(), #{createUser})

INSERT INTO sales_dtl (SALES_ID, PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_DTL_ID, LINE_NO, SALES_TYPE, PAYMENT_TYPE, QTY, UNIT_PRICE, DISCOUNT_PRICE, DISCOUNT_RATE, SALES_PRICE, CREATE_DATE, CREATE_USER) VALUES (#{salesId}, #{productId}, #{productDtlId}, #{lineNo}, 'RESERVATION', 'GRP', #{qty}, #{unitPrice}, #{discountPrice}, #{discountRate}, #{salesPrice}, NOW(), #{createUser})
mapper.update: UPDATE groupbuy_join_mst SET JOIN_STATUS = 'PAYED', SALES_ID = #{salesId}, UNIT_PRICE = #{unitPrice}, UPDATE_USER = #{updateUser}, UPDATE_DATE = NOW() WHERE GROUPBUY_JOIN_MST_ID = #{joinId} AND JOIN_STATUS = 'JOIN'
mapper.select: SELECT JM.GROUPBUY_JOIN_MST_ID AS REF_ID , G.GROUPBUY_ID AS BIZ_ID , G.GROUPBUY_NM AS TITLE , P.PRODUCT_NM AS PRODUCT_NM , JM.TOTAL_QTY AS QTY , JM.JOIN_STATUS AS STATUS , CASE WHEN JM.JOIN_STATUS = 'PAYED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS COMPLETED , COALESCE(JM.UNIT_PRICE, COALESCE((SELECT PS.SALES_PRICE FROM groupbuy_price_step PS WHERE PS.GROUPBUY_ID = G.GROUPBUY_ID AND PS.STEP_QTY_FROM <= G.CURRENT_QTY ORDER BY PS.STEP_QTY_FROM DESC LIMIT 1), P.ORG_SALES_PRICE)) AS UNIT_PRICE , DATE_FORMAT(G.PICKUP_START_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS PICKUP_START_DATE , DATE_FORMAT(G.PICKUP_END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS PICKUP_END_DATE /* DB가 UTC라 NOW() 대신 KST now(UTC_TIMESTAMP()+9h)로 픽업 가능기간 비교 */ , CASE WHEN (UTC_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 9 HOUR) BETWEEN G.PICKUP_START_DATE AND G.PICKUP_END_DATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS PICKUPABLE , CASE WHEN (UTC_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 9 HOUR) > G.PICKUP_END_DATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS EXPIRED FROM groupbuy_join_mst JM JOIN groupbuy_mst G ON JM.GROUPBUY_ID = G.GROUPBUY_ID LEFT JOIN product_mst P ON G.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID WHERE JM.USER_ID = #{userId} AND G.STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND G.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId} AND JM.JOIN_STATUS IN ('JOIN','PAYED') ORDER BY PICKUPABLE DESC, G.PICKUP_START_DATE ASC

SELECT JM.USER_ID AS USER_ID , U.NAME AS NAME , U.PHONE AS PHONE , COUNT(DISTINCT JM.GROUPBUY_JOIN_MST_ID) AS ITEM_CNT , SUM(JM.TOTAL_QTY) AS TOTAL_QTY , SUM(JM.TOTAL_QTY * COALESCE(JM.UNIT_PRICE, 0)) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT , MIN(DATE_FORMAT(G.PICKUP_START_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i')) AS PICKUP_START_DATE , MAX(DATE_FORMAT(G.PICKUP_END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i')) AS PICKUP_END_DATE FROM groupbuy_join_mst JM JOIN groupbuy_mst G ON JM.GROUPBUY_ID = G.GROUPBUY_ID LEFT JOIN user_mst U ON JM.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE G.STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND G.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId} AND JM.JOIN_STATUS = 'JOIN' /* DB가 UTC라 NOW() 대신 KST now(UTC_TIMESTAMP()+9h)로 픽업 가능기간 비교 */ AND (UTC_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 9 HOUR) BETWEEN G.PICKUP_START_DATE AND G.PICKUP_END_DATE GROUP BY JM.USER_ID, U.NAME, U.PHONE ORDER BY TOTAL_AMOUNT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO groupbuy_share_log (GROUPBUY_ID, STORE_ID, LOCATION_ID, USER_ID, SHARE_METHOD, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{groupbuyId}, #{storeId}, #{locationId}, #{userId}, #{shareMethod}, UTC_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 9 HOUR)
